data.html:
<html><head><meta name="color-scheme" content="light dark"></head><body><pre style="word-wrap: break-word; white-space: pre-wrap;">// Local Storage helpers for Signal Marketplace
import type { 
  User, 
  ProviderProfile, 
  Signal, 
  Subscription, 
  Payment, 
  Review,
  Notification,
  PlatformSettings,
  VerificationCode,
  DEFAULT_PLATFORM_SETTINGS 
} from './signal-types';

const KEYS = {
  USER: 'piptray_user',
  USERS: 'piptray_users',
  PROVIDERS: 'piptray_providers',
  SIGNALS: 'piptray_signals',
  SUBSCRIPTIONS: 'piptray_subscriptions',
  PAYMENTS: 'piptray_payments',
  REVIEWS: 'piptray_reviews',
  NOTIFICATIONS: 'piptray_notifications',
  SETTINGS: 'piptray_settings',
  VERIFICATION_CODES: 'piptray_verification_codes',
};

// Generic storage helpers
function getItem<T>(key: string, defaultValue: T): T {
  if (typeof window === 'undefined') return defaultValue;
  try {
    const item = localStorage.getItem(key);
    return item ? JSON.parse(item) : defaultValue;
  } catch {
    return defaultValue;
  }
}

function setItem<T>(key: string, value: T): void {
  if (typeof window === 'undefined') return;
  try {
    localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(value));
  } catch (e) {
    console.error('Storage error:', e);
  }
}

function generateId(): string {
  return `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
}

// User storage
export const userStorage = {
  getCurrentUser: (): User | null => {
    return getItem<User | null>(KEYS.USER, null);
  },
  
  setCurrentUser: (user: User | null): void => {
    setItem(KEYS.USER, user);
  },
  
  getUsers: (): User[] => {
    return getItem<User[]>(KEYS.USERS, []);
  },
  
  saveUser: (user: User): void => {
    const users = userStorage.getUsers();
    const existingIndex = users.findIndex(u => u.id === user.id);
    if (existingIndex >= 0) {
      users[existingIndex] = user;
    } else {
      users.push(user);
    }
    setItem(KEYS.USERS, users);
  },
  
  findByEmail: (email: string): User | undefined => {
    return userStorage.getUsers().find(u => u.email === email);
  },
  
  create: (data: Partial<User>): User => {
    const user: User = {
      id: generateId(),
      email: data.email || '',
      name: data.name || '',
      avatar: data.avatar,
      phone: data.phone,
      role: data.role || 'subscriber',
      emailVerified: data.emailVerified || false,
      emailVerifiedAt: data.emailVerifiedAt,
      createdAt: new Date(),
      updatedAt: new Date(),
    };
    userStorage.saveUser(user);
    return user;
  },
  
  verifyEmail: (userId: string): void => {
    const users = userStorage.getUsers();
    const user = users.find(u => u.id === userId);
    if (user) {
      user.emailVerified = true;
      user.emailVerifiedAt = new Date();
      user.updatedAt = new Date();
      setItem(KEYS.USERS, users);
      
      // Update current user if it's the same
      const currentUser = userStorage.getCurrentUser();
      if (currentUser?.id === userId) {
        setItem(KEYS.USER, user);
      }
    }
  },
};

// Verification code storage
export const verificationStorage = {
  getAll: (): VerificationCode[] => {
    return getItem<VerificationCode[]>(KEYS.VERIFICATION_CODES, []);
  },
  
  getValidCodes: (email: string, type: VerificationCode['type']): VerificationCode[] => {
    return verificationStorage.getAll().filter(
      vc => vc.email === email && vc.type === type && !vc.usedAt && new Date(vc.expiresAt) > new Date()
    );
  },
  
  getByCode: (email: string, code: string, type: VerificationCode['type']): VerificationCode | undefined => {
    return verificationStorage.getValidCodes(email, type).find(vc => vc.code === code);
  },
  
  save: (verificationCode: VerificationCode): void => {
    const codes = verificationStorage.getAll();
    const existingIndex = codes.findIndex(c => c.id === verificationCode.id);
    if (existingIndex >= 0) {
      codes[existingIndex] = verificationCode;
    } else {
      codes.push(verificationCode);
    }
    setItem(KEYS.VERIFICATION_CODES, codes);
  },
  
  create: (email: string, type: VerificationCode['type'], expiryMinutes: number = 15): VerificationCode => {
    // Invalidate any existing codes for this email and type
    const codes = verificationStorage.getAll();
    codes.forEach(c => {
      if (c.email === email && c.type === type && !c.usedAt) {
        c.usedAt = new Date(); // Mark as used to invalidate
      }
    });
    setItem(KEYS.VERIFICATION_CODES, codes);
    
    // Generate 6-digit code
    const code = Math.floor(100000 + Math.random() * 900000).toString();
    
    const verificationCode: VerificationCode = {
      id: generateId(),
      email,
      code,
      type,
      expiresAt: new Date(Date.now() + expiryMinutes * 60 * 1000),
      createdAt: new Date(),
    };
    
    verificationStorage.save(verificationCode);
    return verificationCode;
  },
  
  useCode: (id: string): boolean => {
    const codes = verificationStorage.getAll();
    const code = codes.find(c => c.id === id);
    if (code && !code.usedAt && new Date(code.expiresAt) > new Date()) {
      code.usedAt = new Date();
      setItem(KEYS.VERIFICATION_CODES, codes);
      return true;
    }
    return false;
  },
  
  // Clean up expired codes
  cleanup: (): void => {
    const codes = verificationStorage.getAll();
    const now = new Date();
    const validCodes = codes.filter(c => new Date(c.expiresAt) > now);
    setItem(KEYS.VERIFICATION_CODES, validCodes);
  },
};

// Provider storage
export const providerStorage = {
  getAll: (): ProviderProfile[] => {
    return getItem<ProviderProfile[]>(KEYS.PROVIDERS, []);
  },
  
  getActive: (): ProviderProfile[] => {
    return providerStorage.getAll().filter(p => p.status === 'active');
  },
  
  getById: (id: string): ProviderProfile | undefined => {
    return providerStorage.getAll().find(p => p.id === id);
  },
  
  getByUserId: (userId: string): ProviderProfile | undefined => {
    return providerStorage.getAll().find(p => p.userId === userId);
  },
  
  save: (provider: ProviderProfile): void => {
    const providers = providerStorage.getAll();
    const existingIndex = providers.findIndex(p => p.id === provider.id);
    if (existingIndex >= 0) {
      providers[existingIndex] = { ...providers[existingIndex], ...provider, updatedAt: new Date() };
    } else {
      providers.push(provider);
    }
    setItem(KEYS.PROVIDERS, providers);
  },
  
  create: (userId: string, data: Partial<ProviderProfile>): ProviderProfile => {
    const provider: ProviderProfile = {
      id: generateId(),
      userId,
      displayName: data.displayName || 'Anonymous Trader',
      bio: data.bio,
      avatar: data.avatar,
      status: 'pending',
      tier: 'new',
      weeklyPrice: data.weeklyPrice || 25000,
      monthlyPrice: data.monthlyPrice || 75000,
      quarterlyPrice: data.quarterlyPrice || 200000,
      yearlyPrice: data.yearlyPrice || 700000,
      totalSignals: 0,
      winRate: 0,
      totalPips: 0,
      totalSubscribers: 0,
      activeSubscribers: 0,
      pairs: data.pairs || ['EUR/USD'],
      timeframes: data.timeframes || ['day', 'swing'],
      isVerified: false,
      averageRating: 0,
      totalReviews: 0,
      createdAt: new Date(),
      updatedAt: new Date(),
    };
    providerStorage.save(provider);
    return provider;
  },
};

// Signal storage
export const signalStorage = {
  getAll: (): Signal[] => {
    return getItem<Signal[]>(KEYS.SIGNALS, []);
  },
  
  getActive: (): Signal[] => {
    return signalStorage.getAll().filter(s => s.status === 'active' && s.isPublished);
  },
  
  getByProvider: (providerId: string): Signal[] => {
    return signalStorage.getAll().filter(s => s.providerId === providerId);
  },
  
  getById: (id: string): Signal | undefined => {
    return signalStorage.getAll().find(s => s.id === id);
  },
  
  save: (signal: Signal): void => {
    const signals = signalStorage.getAll();
    const existingIndex = signals.findIndex(s => s.id === signal.id);
    if (existingIndex >= 0) {
      signals[existingIndex] = { ...signals[existingIndex], ...signal, updatedAt: new Date() };
    } else {
      signals.push(signal);
    }
    setItem(KEYS.SIGNALS, signals);
  },
  
  create: (providerId: string, data: Partial<Signal>): Signal => {
    const signal: Signal = {
      id: generateId(),
      providerId,
      pair: data.pair || 'EUR/USD',
      direction: data.direction || 'BUY',
      entryPrice: data.entryPrice || 0,
      entryZoneLow: data.entryZoneLow,
      entryZoneHigh: data.entryZoneHigh,
      tp1: data.tp1 || 0,
      tp2: data.tp2,
      tp3: data.tp3,
      stopLoss: data.stopLoss || 0,
      timeframe: data.timeframe || 'day',
      risk: data.risk || 'medium',
      analysis: data.analysis,
      chartImage: data.chartImage,
      status: 'active',
      isFree: data.isFree || false,
      isPublished: data.isPublished ?? true,
      createdAt: new Date(),
      updatedAt: new Date(),
      viewsCount: 0,
    };
    signalStorage.save(signal);
    
    // Update provider total signals
    const provider = providerStorage.getById(providerId);
    if (provider) {
      provider.totalSignals += 1;
      providerStorage.save(provider);
    }
    
    return signal;
  },
  
  updateStatus: (signalId: string, status: Signal['status']): Signal | null => {
    const signal = signalStorage.getById(signalId);
    if (!signal) return null;
    
    signal.status = status;
    signal.statusUpdatedAt = new Date();
    
    if (status !== 'active') {
      signal.closedAt = new Date();
      // Calculate pips
      signal.pips = calculatePips(signal);
      signal.outcome = status.includes('tp') ? 'win' : status === 'sl_hit' ? 'loss' : 'breakeven';
    }
    
    signalStorage.save(signal);
    
    // Update provider win rate
    updateProviderStats(signal.providerId);
    
    return signal;
  },
};

// Calculate pips based on pair type
function calculatePips(signal: Signal): number {
  const isJpyPair = signal.pair.includes('JPY');
  const isCrypto = signal.pair.includes('BTC') || signal.pair.includes('ETH');
  const pipMultiplier = isJpyPair ? 100 : isCrypto ? 1 : 10000;
  
  const exitPrice = signal.closedPrice || signal.tp1;
  const diff = signal.direction === 'BUY' 
    ? exitPrice - signal.entryPrice 
    : signal.entryPrice - exitPrice;
  
  return Math.round(diff * pipMultiplier);
}

// Update provider stats
function updateProviderStats(providerId: string): void {
  const provider = providerStorage.getById(providerId);
  if (!provider) return;
  
  const signals = signalStorage.getByProvider(providerId);
  const closedSignals = signals.filter(s => s.status !== 'active');
  
  if (closedSignals.length > 0) {
    const wins = closedSignals.filter(s => s.outcome === 'win').length;
    provider.winRate = Math.round((wins / closedSignals.length) * 100);
    provider.totalPips = closedSignals.reduce((sum, s) => sum + (s.pips || 0), 0);
  }
  
  providerStorage.save(provider);
}

// Subscription storage
export const subscriptionStorage = {
  getAll: (): Subscription[] => {
    return getItem<Subscription[]>(KEYS.SUBSCRIPTIONS, []);
  },
  
  getActive: (): Subscription[] => {
    return subscriptionStorage.getAll().filter(s => s.status === 'active' && new Date(s.endDate) > new Date());
  },
  
  getBySubscriber: (subscriberId: string): Subscription[] => {
    return subscriptionStorage.getAll().filter(s => s.subscriberId === subscriberId);
  },
  
  getByProvider: (providerId: string): Subscription[] => {
    return subscriptionStorage.getAll().filter(s => s.providerId === providerId);
  },
  
  getActiveBySubscriber: (subscriberId: string, providerId: string): Subscription | undefined => {
    return subscriptionStorage.getBySubscriber(subscriberId)
      .find(s => s.providerId === providerId && s.status === 'active' && new Date(s.endDate) > new Date());
  },
  
  save: (subscription: Subscription): void => {
    const subscriptions = subscriptionStorage.getAll();
    const existingIndex = subscriptions.findIndex(s => s.id === subscription.id);
    if (existingIndex >= 0) {
      subscriptions[existingIndex] = { ...subscriptions[existingIndex], ...subscription, updatedAt: new Date() };
    } else {
      subscriptions.push(subscription);
    }
    setItem(KEYS.SUBSCRIPTIONS, subscriptions);
  },
  
  create: (subscriberId: string, providerId: string, plan: Subscription['plan'], price: number): Subscription => {
    const now = new Date();
    let endDate = new Date(now);
    
    switch (plan) {
      case 'weekly':
        endDate.setDate(endDate.getDate() + 7);
        break;
      case 'monthly':
        endDate.setMonth(endDate.getMonth() + 1);
        break;
      case 'quarterly':
        endDate.setMonth(endDate.getMonth() + 3);
        break;
      case 'yearly':
        endDate.setFullYear(endDate.getFullYear() + 1);
        break;
    }
    
    const subscription: Subscription = {
      id: generateId(),
      subscriberId,
      providerId,
      plan,
      price,
      status: 'active',
      startDate: now,
      endDate,
      createdAt: now,
      updatedAt: now,
    };
    
    subscriptionStorage.save(subscription);
    
    // Update provider subscriber count
    const provider = providerStorage.getById(providerId);
    if (provider) {
      provider.activeSubscribers += 1;
      provider.totalSubscribers += 1;
      providerStorage.save(provider);
    }
    
    return subscription;
  },
};

// Payment storage
export const paymentStorage = {
  getAll: (): Payment[] => {
    return getItem<Payment[]>(KEYS.PAYMENTS, []);
  },
  
  getById: (id: string): Payment | undefined => {
    return paymentStorage.getAll().find(p => p.id === id);
  },
  
  save: (payment: Payment): void => {
    const payments = paymentStorage.getAll();
    const existingIndex = payments.findIndex(p => p.id === payment.id);
    if (existingIndex >= 0) {
      payments[existingIndex] = { ...payments[existingIndex], ...payment, updatedAt: new Date() };
    } else {
      payments.push(payment);
    }
    setItem(KEYS.PAYMENTS, payments);
  },
  
  create: (userId: string, data: Partial<Payment>): Payment => {
    const payment: Payment = {
      id: generateId(),
      userId,
      providerId: data.providerId,
      subscriptionId: data.subscriptionId,
      amount: data.amount || 0,
      platformFee: data.platformFee || 0,
      providerAmount: data.providerAmount || 0,
      currency: data.currency || 'UGX',
      method: data.method || 'crypto',
      txHash: data.txHash,
      walletAddress: data.walletAddress,
      phoneNumber: data.phoneNumber,
      momoReference: data.momoReference,
      status: 'pending',
      createdAt: new Date(),
      updatedAt: new Date(),
    };
    paymentStorage.save(payment);
    return payment;
  },
};

// Notification storage
export const notificationStorage = {
  getAll: (): Notification[] => {
    return getItem<Notification[]>(KEYS.NOTIFICATIONS, []);
  },
  
  getByUser: (userId: string): Notification[] => {
    return notificationStorage.getAll().filter(n => n.userId === userId);
  },
  
  getUnread: (userId: string): Notification[] => {
    return notificationStorage.getByUser(userId).filter(n => !n.isRead);
  },
  
  save: (notification: Notification): void => {
    const notifications = notificationStorage.getAll();
    const existingIndex = notifications.findIndex(n => n.id === notification.id);
    if (existingIndex >= 0) {
      notifications[existingIndex] = notification;
    } else {
      notifications.push(notification);
    }
    setItem(KEYS.NOTIFICATIONS, notifications);
  },
  
  create: (userId: string, type: Notification['type'], title: string, message: string, data?: Record<string, unknown>): Notification => {
    const notification: Notification = {
      id: generateId(),
      userId,
      type,
      title,
      message,
      data,
      isRead: false,
      createdAt: new Date(),
    };
    notificationStorage.save(notification);
    return notification;
  },
  
  markAsRead: (notificationId: string): void => {
    const notifications = notificationStorage.getAll();
    const notification = notifications.find(n => n.id === notificationId);
    if (notification) {
      notification.isRead = true;
      notification.readAt = new Date();
      setItem(KEYS.NOTIFICATIONS, notifications);
    }
  },
  
  markAllAsRead: (userId: string): void => {
    const notifications = notificationStorage.getAll();
    notifications.forEach(n => {
      if (n.userId === userId) {
        n.isRead = true;
        n.readAt = new Date();
      }
    });
    setItem(KEYS.NOTIFICATIONS, notifications);
  },
};

// Review storage
export const reviewStorage = {
  getAll: (): Review[] => {
    return getItem<Review[]>(KEYS.REVIEWS, []);
  },
  
  getByProvider: (providerId: string): Review[] => {
    return reviewStorage.getAll().filter(r => r.providerId === providerId && r.isPublished);
  },
  
  save: (review: Review): void => {
    const reviews = reviewStorage.getAll();
    const existingIndex = reviews.findIndex(r => r.id === review.id);
    if (existingIndex >= 0) {
      reviews[existingIndex] = { ...reviews[existingIndex], ...review, updatedAt: new Date() };
    } else {
      reviews.push(review);
    }
    setItem(KEYS.REVIEWS, reviews);
  },
  
  create: (subscriberId: string, providerId: string, subscriptionId: string, rating: number, comment?: string): Review => {
    const review: Review = {
      id: generateId(),
      subscriberId,
      providerId,
      subscriptionId,
      rating,
      comment,
      isPublished: true,
      createdAt: new Date(),
      updatedAt: new Date(),
    };
    reviewStorage.save(review);
    
    // Update provider rating
    const provider = providerStorage.getById(providerId);
    if (provider) {
      const providerReviews = reviewStorage.getByProvider(providerId);
      provider.totalReviews = providerReviews.length;
      provider.averageRating = Math.round(
        (providerReviews.reduce((sum, r) => sum + r.rating, 0) / providerReviews.length) * 10
      ) / 10;
      providerStorage.save(provider);
    }
    
    return review;
  },
};

// Platform settings
export const settingsStorage = {
  get: (): PlatformSettings => {
    return getItem<PlatformSettings>(KEYS.SETTINGS, {
      id: 'default',
      cryptoFeePercent: 5,
      mobileMoneyFeePercent: 7,
      verificationFeeUGX: 50000,
      featuredListingFeeUGX: 30000,
      proToolsFeeUGX: 20000,
      minSignalsForVerified: 50,
      minWinRateForVerified: 60,
      updatedAt: new Date(),
    });
  },
  
  save: (settings: PlatformSettings): void => {
    settings.updatedAt = new Date();
    setItem(KEYS.SETTINGS, settings);
  },
};

// Initialize demo data
export function initializeDemoData(): void {
  // Check if already initialized
  if (providerStorage.getAll().length > 0) return;
  
  // Create demo providers
  const demoProviders: Partial<ProviderProfile>[] = [
    {
      displayName: 'FX Pro Uganda',
      bio: 'Professional forex trader with 5+ years experience. Specializing in EUR/USD and XAU/USD.',
      pairs: ['EUR/USD', 'XAU/USD', 'GBP/USD'],
      timeframes: ['day', 'swing'],
      weeklyPrice: 30000,
      monthlyPrice: 100000,
      quarterlyPrice: 270000,
      yearlyPrice: 900000,
      status: 'active',
      tier: 'verified',
      isVerified: true,
      totalSignals: 156,
      winRate: 72,
      totalPips: 2450,
      activeSubscribers: 45,
      totalSubscribers: 120,
      averageRating: 4.5,
      totalReviews: 38,
    },
    {
      displayName: 'Crypto Alpha Signals',
      bio: 'Cryptocurrency trading expert. Technical analysis and on-chain data combined.',
      pairs: ['BTC/USD', 'ETH/USD', 'SOL/USD'],
      timeframes: ['swing', 'position'],
      weeklyPrice: 50000,
      monthlyPrice: 180000,
      quarterlyPrice: 480000,
      yearlyPrice: 1600000,
      status: 'active',
      tier: 'top',
      isVerified: true,
      totalSignals: 89,
      winRate: 78,
      totalPips: 3200,
      activeSubscribers: 82,
      totalSubscribers: 200,
      averageRating: 4.8,
      totalReviews: 67,
    },
    {
      displayName: 'Gold Rush Trading',
      bio: 'XAU/USD specialist. Pure price action analysis with key levels.',
      pairs: ['XAU/USD', 'XAG/USD'],
      timeframes: ['scalp', 'day'],
      weeklyPrice: 25000,
      monthlyPrice: 85000,
      quarterlyPrice: 230000,
      yearlyPrice: 800000,
      status: 'active',
      tier: 'verified',
      isVerified: true,
      totalSignals: 234,
      winRate: 68,
      totalPips: 1890,
      activeSubscribers: 38,
      totalSubscribers: 95,
      averageRating: 4.3,
      totalReviews: 29,
    },
  ];
  
  demoProviders.forEach((data) => {
    const userId = generateId();
    const user = userStorage.create({
      email: `${data.displayName?.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '')}@demo.com`,
      name: data.displayName || 'Demo Provider',
      role: 'provider',
    });
    
    const provider = providerStorage.create(user.id, data);
    provider.status = data.status || 'active';
    provider.tier = data.tier || 'new';
    provider.isVerified = data.isVerified || false;
    provider.totalSignals = data.totalSignals || 0;
    provider.winRate = data.winRate || 0;
    provider.totalPips = data.totalPips || 0;
    provider.activeSubscribers = data.activeSubscribers || 0;
    provider.totalSubscribers = data.totalSubscribers || 0;
    provider.averageRating = data.averageRating || 0;
    provider.totalReviews = data.totalReviews || 0;
    providerStorage.save(provider);
  });
}
</pre></body></html>
